definition: time required for the reverse current of a diode to recover to a specified value, when switched from a specified forward current to a specified reverse voltage, at specified conditions

definition_ml.en: time required for the reverse current of a diode to recover to a specified value, when switched from a specified forward current to a specified reverse voltage, at specified conditions

note: The reverse recovery time is measured as the time interval between t0, the point where the forward current crosses the zero current axis, and the instant when for decreasing values of iR a line through the points for 0.9 IRM and 0.25 IRM crosses the zero current axis.

note_ml.en: The reverse recovery time is measured as the time interval between t0, the point where the forward current crosses the zero current axis, and the instant when for decreasing values of iR a line through the points for 0.9 IRM and 0.25 IRM crosses the zero current axis.
